name: RPlog_To_Kill_A_Karrde_Part_1
title: To Kill a Karrde
summary: After a history that soured from cautious friendship into bitter rivalry -- and with the smuggler chief Talon Karrde eating into Black Sun's profits -- the crimson Twi'lek crime lord Tyy'sun Eson resolves that Karrde must die. On the crowded skywalks of Nar Shaddaa, Eson ambushes the wary Karrde at a support pillar, blocking his path and bluffing that he holds Karrde's associates Lancel, Radke, and Lyra hostage. Words fail and the two draw, but Karrde's blaster bolts only graze the dark-side-fueled Twi'lek, who hurls himself into a savage, animalistic brawl, raining fists and pistol-whipping his foe even after taking a searing gut wound. Driven by rage and raw survival, Eson batters Karrde unconscious to the filthy ground -- not realizing the brutality of the attack marks the final straw that will undo his own grip on Black Sun. Grievously wounded and dizzy, Eson scoops up Karrde's comlink, calls for a transport, and slumps against a wall to guard his prize as the scene fades to black.
